violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Thoroughly clean tables, shelving
Plumbing system. — --Walk-in cooler: drain line from evaporator runs into a bucket instead of to the sewer

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Finish covering ceiling over cooking area in back room (open rafters).
Lighting. — ---Back room lights must be shielded or shatterproof.
